segments.text: O LORD, rebuke me not in your anger, nor discipline me in your wrath.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For your arrows have sunk into me, and your hand has come down on me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: There is no soundness in my flesh because of your indignation; there is no health in my bones because of my sin.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For my iniquities have gone over my head; like a heavy burden, they are too heavy for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My wounds stink and fester because of my foolishness,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I am utterly bowed down and prostrate; all the day I go about mourning.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For my sides are filled with burning, and there is no soundness in my flesh.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I am feeble and crushed; I groan because of the tumult of my heart.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Lord, all my longing is before you; my sighing is not hidden from you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My heart throbs; my strength fails me, and the light of my eyes—it also has gone from me.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: is gone…: Heb. is not with me

segments.text: My friends and companions stand aloof from my plague, and my kinsmen stand far off.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Those who seek my life lay their snares; those who seek my hurt speak of ruin and meditate treachery all day long.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I am like a deaf man; I do not hear, like a mute man who does not open his mouth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have become like a man who does not hear, and in whose mouth are no rebukes.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For I hope in you, O LORD; you will answer, O Lord my God.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: in…: or, thee do I wait for

segments.text: For I said, 'Lest they rejoice over me, who boast themselves against me when my foot slips.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For I am ready to fall, and my pain is ever before me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I confess my iniquity; I am sorry for my sin.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But my foes are alive and strong, and many who hate me without cause have multiplied.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: are lively…: Heb. being living, are strong

segments.text: Those who render me evil for good accuse me because I follow after good.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not forsake me, O LORD; O my God, be not far from me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Make haste to help me, O Lord, my salvation!
segments.speaker: David
